raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Deewß jums tikß eenantoht/ un
wiꞥſch dohs jums Duffefchamu
no wiſteem juhſeem Eenaidnee-
krem wiſsapkahrt/ un juhs dſih-
wofeet Meerâ.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kad nu buhs weena Wee-
ta/ ko tas KUNGS juhfu Deewß
isredſehß jawu Wahrdụ tur ee-
zelt/ us turren buhs jums wiſſu
nest/ ko es jums pawehtu/ juhþus
Dedsamus-Uppurus/ un juhsus
Uppurus/ juhſus Defimitus/ un
juhsas Rohkas Pazelschanas-Up-
purns/ un wiſſu labbaku juhfu
Apsohlifchanu/ ko juhs taim KUN-
GAM eſſat ſohlijscht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un jums buhs preezatees
preeſch ta KUNGA juhfu Dee-
wa/ jums un juhſeem Dehſeim/
un juhſahm Meitahm/un juhſeem
Kalpeem/un juhſahm Kalponehm/
un tam Lewitam/ kas juhsäs
Wahrtis irr/ jo tam ne irr Dal-
liba neds Jhpaſchuns ar jums.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Sargajs/ ka tu tawus
Dedsamus-Uppurus ne uppure
jebkurrä Weetä/ ko tu eerandſihs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet tai Weeta/ ko tas
KUNGS isredſehß eekſch kuh-
das no juhſahm Ziltin/ tur buhs
tew tawus Dedsamus-Uppurus
uppureht/ un tur buhs tew wiſſu
darriht/ ko es tew pawehtu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tomehr pehz wiſſas ta-
was Dwehfeles Eekahrofchanas
warri tu nokaut/ un Galtu ehſt/
pehz ta KUNGA tawa Deewa
Swehtifchanas/ ko wiꞥſch tew
dewis irr wiſſas tawas Wahrtis/
tam Schkiſtam un Nefchſih-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "stam buhs to ehſt/ itt ka to Stir-
nu un to Erſchſi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "To Affini tikcai jums ne
buhs ehſt/ us to Semmi buhs
jums to iſleet itt ka uhdeni.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tu ne warri taiwäs Wahr-
tis ehſt to definitu Teeſu tawas
Labbibas/ un tawa Wiḫna/ un
tawas Etjes/ nedß tohs Pirm-
dſintus tawu leelu Lohpu/ un
tawu ſihku Lohpu/ nedß jebkurro
tawo Apſohlifchanu/ ko tu ap-
tohlijs eſſi/ nedß tawus Uppurus
no kabba Prahta/ nedß tawas
Rohkas Pazelschanas-Uppuri.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet preeſch ta KUNGA
tawa Deewa buhs tew to ehſt/
tai Weetä/ ko tas KUNGS
taws Deewß isredſehß/ tew un
tawam Dehlam/ un tawai Mei-
tai/ un tawam Kalpam/ un ta-
wai Kalponeſ/ un tam Lewitam/
kas tawäs Wahrtis irr/ un tew
preezatees preeſch ta KUNGA
tawa Deewa/ pahr wiſſu/ ko ta-
wäs Rohkas atnefs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Sargajs/ ka tuto Lewitu
ne atſtahji wiſſu tawu Muhschu
tawas Setmes Wirſu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kad tus KUNGS taws
Deewß tawu Rohbeschu isplat-
tihs/ ittin ka wiꞥſch tew runnajs
irr/ un tu tazzisi: Es ehdiſchu
Galtu/ tapehz ka tawai Dweh-
felei gribbahs Galtu ehſt/ tad
warri tu pehz wiſſas tawas
Dwehfeles Eekahrofchanas Gal-
tu ehſt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ja ta Weeta/ ko tas
KUNGS taws Deewß isredſehß
tawu
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
